expectations.evidence: All required sections present: [Context], [Task], [Output Constraint], four elements, continuation marker.

DOMAIN covers 14 PM sub-disciplines: strategy/vision, customer discovery, user research, market analysis, competitive positioning, roadmap planning, prioritization frameworks (RICE, MoSCoW), PRD authorship, cross-functional orchestration, agile/scrum, go-to-market, product analytics, KPI instrumentation, stakeholder management, A/B experimentation, product lifecycle.

GOAL explicitly references engineering background, 'within the next month' urgency, and 6 specific competency gaps: own product vision, lead discovery conversations, translate ambiguous problems, evaluate design/GTM proposals, run cross-functional rituals, establish credibility.
